# pexip_infinity_external_webapp_host (Resource)

Manages an external webapp host. External webapp hosts define external web application endpoints that can be integrated with Pexip Infinity for custom web interfaces and external service integrations.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pexip_infinity_external_webapp_host" "example" {
  address = "webapp.example.com"
}
```


<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `address` (String) The IP address or hostname of the external webapp host. Must be a valid IP address or hostname. Maximum length: 253 characters.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource URI for the external webapp host
- `resource_id` (Number) The resource integer identifier for the external webapp host
